3048610.name: Eden Genesis: Official Soundtrack
3048610.description:
A game without good music, is like a body without a soul... What kind of music do you expect from a fast-paced platformer set in a cyberpunk world? Just what you have in mind!

Eden Genesis: Official Soundtrack features more than 30 music tracks including electronic and frenetic compositions by Juan Ignacio Teruel Torres, the mastermind who created the OST for Aeterna Noctis and Summum Aeterna. Your ears will be delighted as you overcome each challenge.

The soundtrack of "Eden Genesis" is an aural masterpiece, uniting the ancestral with the avant-garde. With its masterful blend of classical rhythms and futuristic sounds, this music not only accompanies, but transforms the gaming experience.

Each note takes the player on an emotional journey, intensifying every moment of the game!
